description: Characters who build, create, or repair things with their hands.
characters: A broad-shouldered worker who shapes metal over roaring flame.
A patient craftsperson who turns thread into cloth on a loom.
A sawdust-covered builder who shapes wood into useful things.
A restless tinkerer always building something new.
A careful worker stitching leather into sturdy shoes.
A detail-obsessed artist who charts lands both known and unknown.
A precise craftsperson who builds tiny machines that mark time.
A careful artisan who sets precious stones in gleaming metal.
